inputLayering.mappingBoundary: solution input MUST be translated into app-manifest before repository-owned assembly tooling is invoked

applicationIdentity.idHint: application.idHint MAY be used to derive app-manifest.application.id; if omitted, the contributor MUST produce a valid manifest id before assembly
applicationIdentity.packagePrefixHint: application.packagePrefixHint MAY be used to derive app-manifest.application.packagePrefix; if omitted, the contributor MUST produce a valid Java package prefix before assembly

mappingGuidance.uiReferenceBoundary: uiReferences inform UI direction and interaction expectations but do not bypass manifest-driven module selection

aiToolingGuidance.nextStep: produce app-manifest before invoking ./scripts/platform-tool.sh assembly scaffold
